title: Fix finance section stats and add Samaleswari Temple hero background

requirements.summary: Update BankFinanceBanner component and translations to display correct financing terms: 90% bank loan and 10% customer payment
acceptanceCriteria: BankFinanceBanner displays '90%' as the bank loan/approval figure
BankFinanceBanner displays '10%' as the customer payment figure
Section heading or subheading reads 'Easy Bank Finance Available' (or translated equivalent)
Translation strings in all three languages (EN/HI/OD) are updated with the correct percentages
No other financing figures appear that contradict 90/10 split

file_operations.description: Update the stat cards to display '90%' for bank loan approval and '10%' for customer payment. Ensure the section heading reflects 'Easy Bank Finance Available'. Update the translation keys used in this component to reference the corrected finance.stat1 and finance.stat2 values from translations.ts.

Update the finance section translation strings in all three languages (en, hi, od). Change finance.stat1.value to '90%' and finance.stat1.label to 'Bank Loan' (or equivalent). Change finance.stat2.value to '10%' and finance.stat2.label to 'Customer Payment' (or equivalent). Update finance.heading to 'Easy Bank Finance Available' and ensure finance.description accurately reflects the 90/10 split. Preserve all existing translation keys.

requirements.summary: Replace hero background with Samaleswari Temple Sambalpur image and ensure text readability with dark overlay
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section background shows the Samaleswari Temple Sambalpur image
Image covers the full viewport width and height (object-cover or equivalent)
Dark overlay ensures all hero text and buttons are readable
No broken image or fallback color visible on load

file_operations.description: Update the hero background to use the generated Samaleswari Temple image from frontend/public/assets/generated/samaleswari-temple-hero.dim_1920x1080.png. Ensure the background image covers the full viewport width and height using object-cover or equivalent CSS. Verify that the dark overlay (rgba or similar) provides sufficient contrast for all headline text, CTA buttons, and trust-stat cards to remain clearly legible. Keep all existing hero content including the WhatsApp CTA button intact.
